---
title: "Joanna Hilary Bonham Carter"
---

## Joanna Hilary Bonham Carter

**Dates:** (1821-1865)

### Description

cousin of Florence Nightingale

### Biography

Several of her portraits of Nightingale were engraved and circulated widely.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept. 27 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
